MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Rahman Popal; The Law Firm for Tenant Rights, Inc.; 628-200-3018; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Kayla Ware.
Joseph F. Offenhauser; Wolfe & Wyman LLP; 925-708-7000; appearing as counsel for defendant Gaetani Real Estate.

Mr. Offenhauser contests the court's tentative decision. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KAYLA WARE'S NOTICE OF MOITON TO ADD DOE DEFENDANTS is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Amend the Complaint to add Mitchell Doyle as a defendant is granted. Motion to add Mr. Doyle as a Doe Defendant is denied. First Amended Complaint shall be filed and served no later than May 6, 2024.
